response: In a March onboarding feedback update, Lisa shares that the latest new hire cohort’s overall satisfaction fell to 7.2/10 from the prior 8.1/10, earning strong marks for its well-regarded buddy system which scored 9.1/10 and timely IT setup, while facing notable gaps including 5 out of 8 new hires being confused about the benefits deadline, tool access taking 3 to 5 days instead of the 1-day internal target, and new hires never receiving a company culture handbook. The only top priority outlined to improve future onboarding experiences is fixing the persistent tool access delays that push the onboarding process far past its intended timeline.
